description: 个人 Claude Code 技能库 - 技能索引

testing.name: 测试相关
testing.description: Web 测试和 MCP 构建

baoyu.name: 宝玉技能
baoyu.description: 翻译/Markdown 处理/YouTube 等工具

social.name: 社交媒体发布
social.description: 公众号/微博/X/小红书发布工具

skills.name: claude-api
skills.description: Build apps with the Claude API or Anthropic SDK
skills.notes: 默认使用 claude-opus-4-6 模型

skills.name: frontend-design
skills.description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces
skills.notes: 强调 bold maximalism，避免通用 AI 美学

skills.name: pdf
skills.description: PDF 文件处理 - 读取、合并、拆分、OCR
skills.notes: 使用 pypdf 和 pdfplumber

skills.name: docx
skills.description: Word 文档处理 - 创建、编辑

skills.name: xlsx
skills.description: Excel 表格处理 - 创建、编辑

skills.name: mcp-builder
skills.description: Guide for creating high-quality MCP servers

skills.name: webapp-testing
skills.description: Automate testing of local web applications using Playwright

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.description: Skill creation and management

skills.name: ai-image-generation
skills.description: Generate AI images with FLUX, Gemini, Grok, Seedream and 50+ models
skills.notes: 需要 inference.sh CLI (infsh)

skills.name: videoagent-video-studio
skills.description: Generate short AI videos from text or images
skills.notes: 支持 7 个后端：minimax, kling, veo, hunyuan, grok, seedance, pixverse

skills.name: web-scraping
skills.description: Web scraping with anti-bot bypass and content extraction
skills.notes: 级联策略：trafilatura → requests → Playwright

skills.name: git-commit
skills.description: Execute git commit with Conventional Commits specification
skills.notes: 自动分析 diff 生成提交消息

skills.name: changelog-generator
skills.description: Automatically create user-facing changelogs from git commits

skills.name: find-skills
skills.description: Discover and install agent skills

skills.name: browser
skills.description: Minimal Chrome DevTools Protocol tools for browser automation and scraping
skills.notes: Start Chrome with --profile to use your authenticated session

skills.name: video-processor
skills.description: Download and process videos from YouTube and other platforms. Supports video download, audio extraction, format conversion, and Whisper transcription
skills.notes: Requires yt-dlp, ffmpeg, and whisper installed

skills.name: docx-format-replicator
skills.description: Extract formatting from existing Word documents and generate new documents with the same format but different content
skills.notes: Uses python-docx for extraction and generation

skills.name: release-skills
skills.description: Universal release workflow. Auto-detects version files and changelogs. Supports Node.js, Python, Rust, Claude Plugin, and generic projects
skills.notes: Generates multi-language changelogs (en/zh/ja/ko/de/fr/es)

skills.name: baoyu-compress-image
skills.description: Compresses images to WebP (default) or PNG with automatic tool selection (sips → cwebp → ImageMagick → Sharp)
skills.notes: Default quality: 80, default format: webp

skills.name: baoyu-format-markdown
skills.description: Formats plain text or markdown files with frontmatter, titles, summaries, headings, bold, lists, and code blocks
skills.notes: Outputs to {filename}-formatted.md, supports title generation formulas

skills.name: baoyu-markdown-to-html
skills.description: Converts Markdown to styled HTML with WeChat-compatible themes. Supports code highlighting, math, PlantUML, footnotes, alerts, and bottom citations
skills.notes: Themes: default, grace, simple, modern. Supports --cite for bottom citations

skills.name: baoyu-translate
skills.description: Translates articles and documents between languages with three modes - quick, normal, and refined. Supports custom glossaries and terminology consistency
skills.notes: Modes: quick (direct), normal (analyze+translate), refined (analyze+translate+review+polish)

skills.name: baoyu-url-to-markdown
skills.description: Fetch any URL and convert to markdown using Chrome CDP. Supports auto-capture and wait-for-user modes, with Defuddle pipeline and YouTube transcript extraction
skills.notes: Fallback: headless → headed → wait mode → defuddle.md API

skills.name: baoyu-youtube-transcript
skills.description: Downloads YouTube video transcripts/subtitles and cover images by URL or video ID. Supports multiple languages, translation, chapters, and speaker identification
skills.notes: Uses InnerTube API with yt-dlp fallback. Caches raw data for fast re-formatting

skills.name: baoyu-danger-gemini-web
skills.description: Generates images and text via reverse-engineered Gemini Web API. Supports text generation, image generation, reference images, and multi-turn conversations
skills.notes: Requires user consent. Models: gemini-3-pro, gemini-3-flash, gemini-3-flash-thinking, gemini-3.1-pro-preview

skills.name: baoyu-danger-x-to-markdown
skills.description: Converts X (Twitter) tweets and articles to markdown with YAML front matter. Uses reverse-engineered API requiring user consent
skills.notes: Requires consent. Supports tweets/threads and X Articles

skills.name: baoyu-post-to-wechat
skills.description: Posts content to WeChat Official Account via API or Chrome CDP. Supports article posting (HTML/markdown/text) and image-text posts (图文)
skills.notes: API method: fast, requires credentials. Browser method: slow, requires login. Multi-account support

skills.name: baoyu-post-to-weibo
skills.description: Posts content to Weibo. Supports regular posts with text/images/videos, and headline articles (头条文章) with Markdown input via Chrome CDP
skills.notes: Title: 32 chars max, Summary: 44 chars max. Uses real Chrome for anti-bot bypass

skills.name: baoyu-post-to-x
skills.description: Posts content and articles to X (Twitter). Supports regular posts with images/videos and X Articles (long-form Markdown) via Chrome CDP
skills.notes: Regular posts: up to 10,000 chars (Premium). Articles: requires X Premium

skills.name: wechat-article-writer
skills.description: 公众号文章自动化写作流程。支持资料搜索、文章撰写、爆款标题生成、排版优化
skills.notes: 4 steps: search → write → generate titles → format

skills.name: xiaohongshu
skills.description: 小红书（RedNote）内容工具 - 搜索笔记、获取详情、发表评论、用户分析、热点跟踪、发布图文/视频笔记
skills.notes: Requires xiaohongshu-mcp. Start service: ./scripts/start-mcp.sh. Status: ./scripts/status.sh
